zh.lifeSummary: John Inglis是Unknown和Katherine Inglis的兒子，於1540年出生在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。他於1562年9月6日與Janet Atkin在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1599年6月23日在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Inglis是Unknown和Katherine Inglis的儿子，于1540年出生在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。他于1562年9月6日与Janet Atkin在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1599年6月23日在英国苏格兰費伏享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Inglis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian): ethnic name from Scots Inglis ‘English(man)’. Compare English .

variants.name: English
meanings: English, Scottish, and Welsh: ethnic name from Middle English English, Inglish, Inglis ‘English’ (Old English Englisc), sometimes alternating with Anglo-Norman French Engleis, Engles, Anglais, Angles (Old French Englois). Compare Inglis and England . Among the aristocracy and upper gentry it marked out a man of English ancestry from one of Norman or continental origin. In counties bordering England with Scotland and Wales the name distinguished an Englishman from a Scot or a native Welshman on both sides of the border. The name may also have been acquired by English merchants who traded abroad or who lived and worked in a ‘French’ borough in England (one exclusively administered by Normans).
Irish: in Ireland, this name was used to denote an Englishman, often being adopted for Irish Aingléis ‘Englishman’ or through mistranslation for Mac an Ghallóglaigh, see Gallogly and Golightly .

variants.name: Gingles
meanings: Irish: from the hybrid name Mac Inglis (Gaelic and English), meaning ‘son of the English speaker’, from Scottish Inglis . This surname is now rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: John Inglis was born in 1540, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland as the son of Unknown and Katherine Inglis. He married Janet Atkin on 6 September 1562, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 June 1599, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: John Inglis est né en 1540, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, fils de Unknown et Katherine Inglis. Il a épousé Janet Atkin le 6 septembre 1562, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 juin 1599, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Inglis wurde 1540 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, als Sohn von Unknown und Katherine Inglis geboren. Er hat am 6. September 1562 in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom Janet Atkin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Juni 1599 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: John Inglis è nato il nel 1540 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland come figlio di Unknown e Katherine Inglis. Lui sposato Janet Atkin il 6 settembre 1562, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 giugno 1599, nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Inglisは1540年にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインでUnknownとKatherine Inglisの息子として生まれた。1562年9月6日にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインでJanet Atkinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1599年6月23日にイギリススコットランドフィフで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Inglis(은)는 1540년 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 Unknown(와)과 Katherine Inglis의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1562년 9월 6일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 Janet Atkin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 6월 23일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Inglis nasceu em 1540, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland filho de Unknown e Katherine Inglis. Ele casou-se com Janet Atkin em 6 de setembro de 1562, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de junho de 1599, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Inglis родился в 1540 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Unknown и Katherine Inglis. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Atkin 6 сентября 1562 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 июня 1599 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Inglis nació en 1540, en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland como hijo de Unknown y Katherine Inglis. Se casó con Janet Atkin el 6 de septiembre de 1562, en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de junio de 1599, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
